attractions.name: Rose Garden
attractions.description: Meticulously maintained garden nestled amidst rolling hills with stunning collection of roses in various hues and sizes. Features other flowering plants with winding paths and panoramic views of tea gardens and mist-covered mountains
source_files: Karnataka, Kerala and Tamil Nadu/All Inclusive Guide- Kerala.pdf

attractions.name: Kolukkumalai Tea Estate
attractions.description: Perched high in Theni district of Tamil Nadu near Munnar, renowned for producing world's highest-elevation tea. Visitors can witness traditional tea processing methods and sample distinct flavorful tea
attractions.hours: 7am to 6 pm Mon- Saturday. Closed on Sundays
attractions.entry_fee: Rs. 100 per person for tea factory visit
source_files: Karnataka, Kerala and Tamil Nadu/All Inclusive Guide- Kerala.pdf

attractions.name: Attukad Waterfalls
attractions.description: Majestic cascade nestled amidst lush greenery of Munnar. Viewpoint offers stunning panoramic vistas. Road leading to falls can be rough
source_files: Karnataka, Kerala and Tamil Nadu/All Inclusive Guide- Kerala.pdf
